Augus.name: Augus
Augus.description: Perhaps a good source for building schematics and historical details, or perhaps a rival who designs security measures?

Steiner.name: Steiner
Steiner.description: Perhaps one of your competitors, or a former partner from before you joined the crew?

Elynn.name: Elynn
Elynn.description: Perhaps a friend who can help with the infernal paperwork of the Empire?

Decker.name: Decker
Decker.description: Perhaps a client in need of the illegal tools of revolution?

Sevoy.name: Sevoy
Sevoy.description: Perhaps a connection to clients with deep pockets?

Laroze.name: Laroze
Laroze.description: Perhaps an informant within the City Watch?

Bazso Baz.name: Bazso Baz
Bazso Baz.description: Perhaps a paramour pursuing your affections, or perhaps a former lover, now scorned?

Salia.name: Salia
Salia.description: Perhaps a reliable contact for underworld jobs, or perhaps a former partner who sold you out?

Quellyn.name: Quellyn
Quellyn.description: Perhaps a knowledgeable healer and seer, or perhaps a student of yours who left over bad blood?

Veldren.name: Veldren
Veldren.description: Perhaps an addict too poisoned to ever return to lucid thought, or perhaps an explorer of psychedelic realms beyond mere mortal experience?

Lutes.name: Lutes
Lutes.description: Perhaps a good source of news and gossip?

Irimina.name: Irimina
Irimina.description: Perhaps a potential patron for your crew?

Dowler.name: Dowler
Dowler.description: Perhaps one of the rare deathlands scavengers that survived his sentence?

Veleris.name: Veleris
Veleris.description: Who does Veleris give their intelligence to?

Rolan.name: Rolan
Rolan.description: Perhaps a client with strong underworld ties?

Trev.name: Trev
Trev.description: Perhaps a gang that helped your crew get started?

Hoxley.name: Hoxley
Hoxley.description: Perhaps a friend of powerful ship captains?

Celene.name: Celene
Celene.description: Celene is a guardian; a protector. Who does she watch over?

Telda.name: Telda
Telda.description: Perhaps a mentor who taught you your skills, or perhaps a rival sneak-thief?

Jeren.name: Jeren
Jeren.description: Perhaps a double-agent within the City Watch, or perhaps an overly curious officer, interested in your crimes?

Meg.name: Meg
Meg.description: Perhaps a trainer, or perhaps a fellow extortion artist?

Chael.name: Chael
Chael.description: Perhaps a member of a gang that you were in before the current crew, or an independent operator who’s been in your way before?

Karlos.name: Karlos
Karlos.description: Perhaps a source for off-book government “wet work?”

Malista.name: Malista
Malista.description: To what forgotten god does Malista give her service?

Mercy.name: Mercy
Mercy.description: Perhaps an assassin for hire, or a particularly deadly underworld scoundrel?

Flint.name: Flint
Flint.description: Perhaps a good source for unusual arcane supplies, or perhaps a rival in the occult world of Duskwall?

Nyryx.name: Nyryx
Nyryx.description: Perhaps an informant to spark potential marks, or perhaps a rival manipulator?

Frake.name: Frake
Frake.description: Perhaps an expert that you go to for consultations, or perhaps a master who creates locks to defeat you?

Jul.name: Jul
Jul.description: What other strange clients do they have?

Conway.name: Conway
Conway.description: Perhaps an informant within the City Watch?

Roslyn Kellis.name: Roslyn Kellis
Roslyn Kellis.description: Perhaps an old friend and confidant, or perhaps one of the victims of your espionage, bent on revenge?

Lydra.name: Lydra
Lydra.description: Perhaps she acts as a liaison with your clients?

Bryl.name: Bryl
Bryl.description: Perhaps a reliable underworld contact, or perhaps an old partner with a grudge?

Scurlock.name: Scurlock
Scurlock.description: Perhaps a mentor, or perhaps a deadly rival?

Sawtooth.name: Sawtooth
Sawtooth.description: Perhaps a buddy from the war, or perhaps a butcher who botched your treatment?

Grace.name: Grace
Grace.description: Perhaps a former partner in thuggery, or a competitor on the scene?

Marlane.name: Marlane
Marlane.description: Perhaps a pit fighter down at the docks, or a boxing coach who trained you?

Casta.name: Casta
Casta.description: Perhaps a mentor who trained you in the deadly arts, or vice versa?

Stazia.name: Stazia
Stazia.description: Perhaps a former scoundrel turned to legitimate alchemical business, or perhaps the other way around?

Rigney.name: Rigney
Rigney.description: Perhaps a good source of news and gossip?

Adelaide Phroaig.name: Adelaide Phroaig
Adelaide Phroaig.description: Perhaps a source for scores among the elite?

Marlo.name: Marlo
Marlo.description: Perhaps a good partner with a gang of tough thugs?

Darmot.name: Darmot
Darmot.description: Perhaps a savvy officer that’s busted you many times, or perhaps an old friend who turned to the law instead of crime?

Setarra.name: Setarra
Setarra.description: Perhaps your partner in a dark endeavor, or perhaps an entity you once controlled, seeking vengeance?

Rolan Wott.name: Rolan Wott
Rolan Wott.description: Perhaps with a feckless son in Doskvol Academy, always in need of rescuing?

Nyelle.name: Nyelle
Nyelle.description: Perhaps a supplier for the strangest of cargo?

Melvir.name: Melvir
Melvir.description: Perhaps an old friend who’s patched you up many times, or someone to whom you’ve sent too many victims?

Riven.name: Riven
Riven.description: Perhaps a good source of medicines for recovery?

Walker.name: Walker
Walker.description: Perhaps an employer who often needs violent work?

Harker.name: Harker
Harker.description: Perhaps a friend who you helped when you were in prison, or perhaps an enemy who hurt you when you served your time?

Esme.name: Esme
Esme.description: Perhaps a good source of news and gossip?

Amancio.name: Amancio
Amancio.description: Perhaps a well-connected underworld figure, famous for their neutrality?

Jennah.name: Jennah
Jennah.description: Perhaps a good source for gossip among the upper class?
